# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-stage Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install dependencies and build
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run build

      - name: Create artifact directory
        run: mkdir -p artifact-dist

      - name: Copy build artifacts
        run: cp -r dist/* artifact-dist/

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: artifact-dist/
          retention-days: 1

  deploy-staging:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: ./staging-deploy

      - name: List downloaded files (for verification)
        run: ls -R ./staging-deploy

      - name: Set up SSH
        uses: webfactory/ssh-agent@v0.9.0
        with:
          ssh-private-key: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_STAGING }}

      - name: Deploy to Staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy_staging.sh
          ./scripts/deploy_staging.sh ./staging-deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_USER }}

  deploy-production:
    needs: deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://production.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: ./production-deploy

      - name: List downloaded files (for verification)
        run: ls -R ./production-deploy

      - name: Set up SSH
        uses: webfactory/ssh-agent@v0.9.0
        with:
          ssh-private-key: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PRODUCTION }}

      - name: Deploy to Production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to production environment..."
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy_production.sh
          ./scripts/deploy_production.sh ./production-deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_USER }}
